name: South Suburban Housing Center
description_short: Non-profit HUD-approved housing counseling center in Illinois offering free financial literacy, mortgage counseling, and homebuyer education through group and online formats.
description_long: South Suburban Housing Center is a non-profit housing counseling agency located in Homewood, Illinois, serving the south suburban Chicago region. The organization is HUD-approved and certified to provide professional housing counseling services to consumers seeking guidance on homeownership and housing-related financial matters. The center offers a comprehensive range of counseling services including pre-purchase homebuyer education, mortgage delinquency resolution, financial and budgeting workshops, credit counseling, reverse mortgage counseling, and home improvement guidance. They deliver services through both group counseling sessions and internet-based counseling to accommodate different learning preferences and accessibility needs. What distinguishes South Suburban Housing Center is its focus on preventative financial education combined with crisis intervention for homeowners facing delinquency. The organization provides workshops specifically designed to resolve and prevent mortgage default, reflecting expertise in supporting at-risk borrowers. Their dual-delivery model (in-person group sessions and online counseling) makes services accessible to working professionals and those with transportation constraints. As a non-profit, free-help agency, South Suburban Housing Center serves consumers who need objective, unbiased housing counseling without commercial incentives.
pros: HUD-approved housing counselor services ensure counselors meet federal certification standards
Completely free counseling services with no commercial conflicts of interest
Offers specialized mortgage delinquency resolution counseling for homeowners in financial crisis
Dual delivery model includes both in-person group counseling and internet counseling for accessibility
Provides reverse mortgage counseling, a specialized service not common at all counseling agencies
Financial and budgeting workshops available to improve money management skills beyond housing
Pre-purchase homebuyer education helps first-time buyers understand the full homeownership commitment
cons: Website navigation issues (404 error on About page) make detailed agency background information inaccessible
Serves only Illinois residents, primarily south suburban Chicago area, limiting geographic availability
Only conducts counseling in English despite serving diverse suburban demographic
No online appointment scheduling or contact form visible on main website page
best_for: Illinois homeowners facing mortgage delinquency or default seeking free resolution counseling
First-time homebuyers in south suburban Chicago needing pre-purchase education and financial planning
Homeowners considering reverse mortgages who need objective counseling before proceeding
Individuals seeking free financial literacy and budgeting workshops without sales pressure
diagnosis: South Suburban Housing Center is best for Illinois residents (particularly south suburban Chicago) who need free, HUD-certified housing counseling for pre-purchase planning, mortgage delinquency prevention or resolution, or general financial literacy. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Illinois and website accessibility issues that may require direct phone contact to (708) 957-4674 rather than online scheduling.
services: Mortgage Delinquency and Default Resolution Counseling
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
meta_description: South Suburban Housing Center provides free financial literacy, mortgage counseling, and homebuyer education in Illinois.
